title: Create or Join a Game
lead: Confirm your display name first, then join from the available rooms. Create a new room only when none fit. Use a room code only if you received an invite.

identityCard.noProfileHelperText: Set a nickname before creating or joining rooms on this device.
identityCard.hasProfileHelperText: This nickname will be used when creating or joining rooms.
identityCard.description: Resume a room or game you left earlier.
identityCard.formDescription: Enter an easily recognizable name. You can change it later in the lobby.
identityCard.statusHint: Nickname is saved only on this device to identify your room seat.

roomsSection.title: Available Rooms
roomsSection.empty: No rooms waiting for players right now.
roomsSection.emptyHint: You can create a new room on the right.
roomsSection.listHint: Prioritize joining rooms from the list. Only enter a room code manually if a friend shared a private code.
roomsSection.errorDetail: The network or backend service may be refreshing. You can retry or use the room code entry on the right.
roomsSection.loadingDetail: Rooms with more players and games closer to starting are shown first.
roomsSection.emptyDetail: You can create a new game or ask a friend for a room code and join from the alternate entrance.

entryForm.createDescription: Create a game and invite other players to join.
entryForm.joinDescription: Enter a room code from a friend to join a private room.
entryForm.inviteDescriptionWithCode: A friend shared a room code with you—confirm your identity to join {{code}}.
entryForm.inviteDescriptionPrefilled: Room code {{code}} is already filled in—confirm your identity to join.
entryForm.joinHint: Enter the correct code to enter the corresponding room directly.

recentRoomCard.unavailableDetail: This entry is temporarily unavailable. You can still rejoin by room code.
recentRoomCard.detailInGame: When you left, this room had entered a game or finished settlement.
recentRoomCard.detailWaiting: You can return to the room to continue preparation or wait for the game to start.

continueBanner.title: Recoverable Progress
continueBanner.description: Found a room or game you left earlier.

messages.nicknameRequired: Please enter the display name you want to use for this game.
messages.identityConfirmed: Identity confirmed. You can now proceed to lobby actions.
messages.progressRecovered: Your previous progress has been restored.
messages.recoveryFailedIdentityKept: Unable to recover your previous progress, but your identity is still preserved.
messages.sessionCleared: The saved session record on this device has been cleared.
messages.identityCleared: Both identity and session records on this device have been cleared.
messages.roomCodeRequired: Please enter a room code before joining.

statusNotice.creatingDesc: You will enter the room automatically once it is created.
statusNotice.joiningDesc: Verifying the room code. You will enter the room directly once confirmed.
statusNotice.restoringDesc: If the previous session is still valid, you will return to your original room or game.
